testcase.name: test_auto_generate_code_for_expense

failure.message: AssertionError: Expense code should start with 5, got 6902 assert False + where False = <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfc9a50c26930>('5') + where <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfc9a50c26930> = '6902'.startswith

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_cogs_journal_entries.py:120: in test_auto_generate_code_for_expense assert next_code.startswith("5"), f"Expense code should start with 5, got {next_code}" E AssertionError: Expense code should start with 5, got 6902 E assert False E + where False = <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfc9a50c26930>('5') E + where <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfc9a50c26930> = '6902'.startswith

testcase.name: test_create_sales_order_creates_cogs_journal_entry

failure.message: AssertionError: COGS journal entry not found for order df01cce7-afc0-45f1-9aa3-2caef76680fb. Entries with this order_id: ['Sales Revenue - SO-20260216-2B33', 'Cost of Goods Sold - SO-20260216-2B33'] assert 0 >= 1 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_cogs_journal_entries.py:343: in test_create_sales_order_creates_cogs_journal_entry assert len(cogs_entries) >= 1, f"COGS journal entry not found for order {order_id}. Entries with this order_id: {[e.get('description') for e in entries if e.get('reference_id') == order_id]}" E AssertionError: COGS journal entry not found for order df01cce7-afc0-45f1-9aa3-2caef76680fb. Entries with this order_id: ['Sales Revenue - SO-20260216-2B33', 'Cost of Goods Sold - SO-20260216-2B33'] E assert 0 >= 1 E + where 0 = len([])
